# CWE-262 — Not Using Password Aging (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-262-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

type credRow struct {
	User     string    `db:"user"`
	Hash     string    `db:"hash"`
	LastSeen time.Time `db:"last_seen"`
}

// Vulnerable: login never checks password age or forces rotation.
func LoginNoAging(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	user := c.PostForm("user")
	var row credRow
	_ = db.Get(&row, "SELECT user, hash, last_seen FROM creds WHERE user = ?", user)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"session": user})
}
